spec.expr: max by (name) ((container_spec_cpu_quota{name="$container"} and (time() - timestamp(container_spec_cpu_quota{name="$container"}) < 30))) / max by (name) ((container_spec_cpu_period{name="$container"} and (time() - timestamp(container_spec_cpu_period{name="$container"}) < 30)))

spec.title: Step durations by session (embed / qdrant / rerank / generate)
spec.description: One row per pipeline step per request -- match rows by Trace Service/Trace Name/start time to see which steps belong to the same session. Click into 'Recent traces' above for the full per-session waterfall instead.

spec.title: Trace waterfall ($trace_id)
spec.description: Click a Trace ID in 'Recent traces' or 'Step durations' below to fill this in.

spec.title: Step durations — search_documents
spec.description: Only spans from search_documents calls (embed_query/qdrant_search/rerank -- never generate).
